decisions.decision: Use localhost:20005 (not registry:5000) as push target in seed.sh
decisions.rationale: docker push runs via host Docker socket — registry:5000 is only resolvable within Compose network

decisions.decision: Use python3 -m pip instead of pip3 wrapper on ubuntu:18.04
decisions.rationale: pip3 shim bypasses pip upgrades; -m pip uses the freshly upgraded version
PhaseA services on non-standard ports were invisible to scanner

next_action: Check if image-mixed seed succeeded: curl -s http://127.0.0.1:20005/v2/_catalog — should show 3 repos. If not, check docker logs for seed container and fix remaining build error.
context_notes: Working through UAT test cases for the chaos lab. PhaseA scan fix and registry seed fixes are the active work. The image-mixed Dockerfile has been the hardest — ubuntu:18.04 + Python 3.6 + old cryptography package is a painful combination. Latest attempt uses python3 -m pip + setuptools + wheel + --no-build-isolation. Still unconfirmed.
